message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with expanded dependencies

Updates Cargo.lock with 93 new/modified dependency entries, likely from
adding new features or updating existing dependencies in the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "slab",
+ "socket2",
  "thiserror",
 ]
 
@@ -891,6 +892,16 @@ version = "1.15.1"
